from src.config import settings
from src.filter.matcher import JobMatcher

matcher = JobMatcher\(settings\)

# Test some titles
tests = [
    \('Software Engineer, Backend', 'Remote', None\),
    \('Senior Staff Software Engineer', 'San Francisco, CA', None\),
    \('AI Engineer', 'New York, NY', None\),
    \('ML Engineer', 'London, UK', None\),
    \('VP of Engineering', 'Remote', None\),
    \('Forward Deployed Engineer', 'Austin, TX', None\),
    \('Principal Software Engineer', 'Remote', None\),
    \('Solutions Engineer', 'Remote', '5+ years of experience required'\),
    \('Software Engineer, New Grad', 'Remote', 'new graduate program'\),
]

for title, loc, desc in tests:
    result = matcher.match\(title, loc, desc\)
    status = 'MATCH' if result.matched else 'REJECT'
    print\(f'{status:6} | {title:40} | {loc:20} | {result.reason_str}'\)
" 2>&1)

import asyncio
from src.config import settings
from src.db import Database
from src.detection.scheduler import build_scheduler
from src.filter.matcher import JobMatcher
from src.notify.discord import DiscordNotifier
from src.pipeline import JobPipeline
from src.logging import setup_logging

async def test\(\):
    setup_logging\('INFO'\)
    
    db = Database\(settings.db_path\)
    await db.connect\(\)
    
    matcher = JobMatcher\(settings\)
    notifier = DiscordNotifier\(settings.discord_webhook_url\)
    pipeline = JobPipeline\(db=db, matcher=matcher, notifier=notifier\)
    
    scheduler = build_scheduler\(settings.companies_path, pipeline\)
    print\(f'Scheduler built with {len\(scheduler.get_jobs\(\)\)} jobs'\)
    for job in scheduler.get_jobs\(\)[:5]:
        print\(f'  - {job.name} \(next run: {job.next_run_time}\)'\)
    print\(f'  ... and {len\(scheduler.get_jobs\(\)\) - 5} more'\)
    
    await db.close\(\)
    print\('All systems OK!'\)

asyncio.run\(test\(\)\)
" 2>&1)

import asyncio
import httpx
from src.detection.greenhouse import GreenhouseScraper
from src.filter.matcher import JobMatcher
from src.config import settings

async def test\(\):
    scraper = GreenhouseScraper\('anthropic', 'Anthropic'\)
    async with httpx.AsyncClient\(timeout=httpx.Timeout\(30.0\), headers={'User-Agent': 'JobHunterBot/1.0'}\) as client:
        jobs = await scraper.fetch_jobs\(client\)
    
    print\(f'Fetched {len\(jobs\)} jobs from Anthropic'\)
    
    matcher = JobMatcher\(settings\)
    matched = 0
    for job in jobs:
        result = matcher.match\(job.title, job.location, job.description_text\)
        if result.matched:
            matched += 1
            if matched <= 10:
                print\(f'  MATCH: {job.title} | {job.location} | {result.reason_str}'\)
    
    print\(f'\\n{matched}/{len\(jobs\)} jobs matched your filters'\)

asyncio.run\(test\(\)\)
" 2>&1)

import asyncio
from src.config import settings
from src.db import Database
from src.detection.scheduler import build_scheduler
from src.filter.matcher import JobMatcher
from src.notify.discord import DiscordNotifier
from src.pipeline import JobPipeline
from src.logging import setup_logging

async def test\(\):
    setup_logging\('INFO'\)

    db = Database\(settings.db_path\)
    await db.connect\(\)

    matcher = JobMatcher\(settings\)
    notifier = DiscordNotifier\(settings.discord_webhook_url\)
    pipeline = JobPipeline\(db=db, matcher=matcher, notifier=notifier\)

    scheduler = await build_scheduler\(settings.cache_dir, pipeline\)
    jobs = scheduler.get_jobs\(\)
    print\(f'\\nScheduler built with {len\(jobs\)} scheduled jobs:'\)
    for job in jobs:
        print\(f'  - {job.name} \(interval: {job.trigger}, next: {job.next_run_time}\)'\)

    await db.close\(\)
    print\('\\nAll systems OK!'\)

asyncio.run\(test\(\)\)
" 2>&1)

import asyncio, httpx
from pathlib import Path
from src.config import settings
from src.db import Database
from src.detection.greenhouse import GreenhouseScraper
from src.filter.matcher import JobMatcher
from src.notify.discord import DiscordNotifier
from src.pipeline import JobPipeline

async def test\(\):
    # Setup
    db = Database\(Path\('data/jobs_test.db'\)\)
    await db.connect\(\)
    matcher = JobMatcher\(settings\)
    notifier = DiscordNotifier\(settings.discord_webhook_url\)
    pipeline = JobPipeline\(db=db, matcher=matcher, notifier=notifier\)
    
    # Scrape Anthropic
    scraper = GreenhouseScraper\(board_token='anthropic', company_name='Anthropic'\)
    async with httpx.AsyncClient\(timeout=30.0\) as client:
        jobs = await scraper.fetch_jobs\(client\)
    print\(f'Fetched {len\(jobs\)} jobs from Anthropic'\)
    
    # Run pipeline \(insert → filter → notify\)
    new_count = await pipeline.process_new_jobs\(jobs\)
    print\(f'New jobs inserted: {new_count}'\)
    
    # Check results
    pending = await db.get_pending_jobs\(\)
    matched = await db.get_matched_unnotified\(\)
    cursor = await db.db.execute\(\\"SELECT filter_status, COUNT\(*\) FROM jobs GROUP BY filter_status\\"\)
    stats = await cursor.fetchall\(\)
    for status, count in stats:
        print\(f'  {status}: {count}'\)
    
    print\(f'\\\\nMatched & notified to Discord: check your Discord!'\)
    
    await db.close\(\)

asyncio.run\(test\(\)\)
" 2>&1)

import asyncio, httpx
from src.filter.matcher import JobMatcher
from src.config import settings

async def test\(\):
    from src.detection.greenhouse import GreenhouseScraper
    scraper = GreenhouseScraper\(board_token='anthropic', company_name='Anthropic'\)
    async with httpx.AsyncClient\(timeout=30.0\) as client:
        jobs = await scraper.fetch_jobs\(client\)
    
    m = JobMatcher\(settings\)
    matched = []
    for j in jobs:
        r = m.match\(j.title, j.location, j.description_text\)
        if r.matched:
            matched.append\(\(j.title, j.location, r.reason_str\)\)
    
    print\(f'{len\(jobs\)} total → {len\(matched\)} matched \(was 64 before\)'\)
    print\(\)
    for title, loc, reason in matched:
        print\(f'  {title} | {loc}'\)

asyncio.run\(test\(\)\)
" 2>&1)
